title: andropogon tener
intro: Andropogon tener, also known as the desert broom grass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of volatile oils and saponins. The health benefits of Andropogon tener include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Andropogon tener is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be dried and used as a herbal powder for topical applications.
